title: Pros and cons
subtitle: Give one advantage and one disadvantage.
overview: Give one advantage and one disadvantage.
B1 Bridge builds connected speaking: clear points, useful reasons, real examples, repair phrases, short writing, and natural spoken practice.

sections.title: B1 bridge focus
rows: Today you practice advantages and disadvantages. Keep the answer clear, connected, and useful in real conversation.
平衡表达要能看到优点和缺点。
A practical B1 frame: start with the main idea, add one reason, give one real detail, and finish naturally.
实用 B1 框架：先说主要想法，加一个原因，给一个真实细节，然后自然收尾。
What are one advantage and one disadvantage of online learning?
线上学习的一个优点和一个缺点是什么？
One advantage of learning with an app is convenience. One disadvantage is that it is easy to skip speaking practice. Overall, I need to use the app actively, not silently.
用 app 学习的一个优点是方便。一个缺点是容易跳过口语练习。总体来说，我需要主动使用这个 app，而不是默默看。

items.en: Today you practice advantages and disadvantages. Keep the answer clear, connected, and useful in real conversation.
items.zh: 平衡表达要能看到优点和缺点。

items.en: A practical B1 frame: start with the main idea, add one reason, give one real detail, and finish naturally.
items.zh: 实用 B1 框架：先说主要想法，加一个原因，给一个真实细节，然后自然收尾。

items.en: One advantage of learning with an app is convenience. One disadvantage is that it is easy to skip speaking practice. Overall, I need to use the app actively, not silently.
items.zh: 用 app 学习的一个优点是方便。一个缺点是容易跳过口语练习。总体来说，我需要主动使用这个 app，而不是默默看。

items.en: This is B1 practice: clear enough, connected enough, and useful in real life.
items.zh: 这是 B1 练习：足够清楚、足够连贯，并且能在真实生活中使用。

items.en: I do not need perfect English today; I need organized English that I can say aloud.
items.zh: 今天我不需要完美英语；我需要能大声说出来的、有条理的英语。

items.en: First, say the sentence slowly and clearly.
items.zh: 首先，慢速清楚地说这个句子。

items.en: Then, say it again with a natural rhythm.
items.zh: 然后，用自然节奏再说一遍。

items.en: Finally, change one detail and make it true for your life.
items.zh: 最后，改变一个细节，让它符合你的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What are one advantage and one disadvantage of online learning?
lines.zh: 线上学习的一个优点和一个缺点是什么？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: One advantage of learning with an app is convenience. One disadvantage is that it is easy to skip speaking practice. Overall, I need to use the app actively, not silently.
lines.zh: 用 app 学习的一个优点是方便。一个缺点是容易跳过口语练习。总体来说，我需要主动使用这个 app，而不是默默看。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make it shorter and clearer?
lines.zh: 你能把它说得更短、更清楚吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the main idea, one reason, and one real detail.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留主要想法、一个原因和一个真实细节。

items.en: What are one advantage and one disadvantage of online learning?
items.zh: 线上学习的一个优点和一个缺点是什么？

items.en: Answer with the frame first, then answer again with your own real details.
items.zh: 先用框架回答，然后用你自己的真实细节再回答一遍。

items.en: Record one version. Listen for clear rhythm, not perfect grammar.
items.zh: 录一个版本。听清楚节奏，而不是追求完美语法。

items.en: Keep the answer between four and six sentences.
items.zh: 把回答控制在四到六句之间。
